app.description: Power-user OpenClaw deployment with agent sandboxing, persistent home volume, and Playwright browser support. WARNING: Mounts Docker socket to enable agent sandbox containers — grants the container access to the host Docker daemon.

variables.name: OPENCLAW_OLLAMA_HEARTBEAT
variables.description: Route heartbeats to Ollama (free) instead of paid API
variables.promptText:
Route heartbeats to a FREE local LLM via Ollama?

By default, OpenClaw heartbeats use your paid API.
If you have Ollama installed, this will pull llama3.2:3b
and route heartbeat checks through it instead — saving
~$5-15/month on API costs.

Requires: Ollama container running.

Type 'yes' to enable or 'no' to skip:

secrets.name: openclaw_gateway_token
secrets.description: Gateway authentication token — passed to the gateway process via OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN env var. Generated by Deployrr and stored as a Docker secret.

secrets.name: openclaw.env
secrets.description: Derived env file written by pre-install containing OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN. Used by compose via env_file: since Docker standalone secrets cannot override host file permissions.

dialog.title: OpenClaw - RISKY Deployment
dialog.message:
\Z1⚠ SECURITY WARNING:\Zn This deployment mounts the Docker socket.

This grants the container full access to your host Docker daemon, which allows it to:
• Create and destroy containers on your host
• Access host networking and volumes
• Potentially escalate privileges

This enables the \Z4Agent Sandbox\Zn feature (isolated containers per agent) and \Z4Playwright\Zn browser automation.

Only install this if you understand the risks.

Do you want to proceed?

messages.text: OpenClaw gateway is running at http://$SERVER_LAN_IP:$OPENCLAW_PORT
Your gateway token has been saved to $DOCKER_FOLDER/secrets/openclaw_gateway_token
Traefik handles authentication automatically — no token or device pairing needed via your domain URL.
If 9Router is installed: Open 9Router dashboard → Providers → connect at least one provider → OpenClaw is ready!
If 9Router is NOT installed: Configure API providers manually via OpenClaw Settings or use: docker exec -it openclaw openclaw configure
Docker socket is mounted — this container can manage host Docker resources.
Agent sandbox enabled. Build sandbox image: sudo docker compose run --rm openclaw node /app/node_modules/playwright-core/cli.js install chromium
If Ollama heartbeat was configured, heartbeats use ollama/llama3.2:3b (free) instead of your paid API.
